mutators.name: recordPlanting
mutators.semantics: Appends one composite planting event that creates the plant and its seeding and/or transplanting movements; every movement is isMovement:true and isLog:false, and is pending unless that leg's done flag is true.
mutators.derived_from: invented: the source creates related plant assets and seeding/transplanting records through form workflow rather than one named domain operation

mutators.name: createPlantingPlan
mutators.semantics: Appends a planting-plan creation event; only a nonempty seasons selection updates this actor's remembered season defaults, while an empty selection leaves the prior defaults unchanged.
mutators.derived_from: invented: remembered selected seasons is conditional state written by the plan-creation workflow, not a single source method

mutators.name: recordHarvest
mutators.semantics: Appends a harvest log, never a movement; lotNumber is an optional opaque string, and null or empty quantity is persisted as quantityPayload:[null] rather than as zero or an omitted wrapper.

mutators.name: confirmRecord
mutators.semantics: Appends a confirmation status event for a previously pending record; later status events supersede earlier status in status-sensitive projections.
mutators.derived_from: invented: pending-versus-done lifecycle status is produced by source form workflows rather than a Harvest class method

mutators.name: recordBirth
mutators.semantics: Appends a birth observation for the plant; when concurrent births converge, earliest-hlc-wins; later concurrent birth demoted to observation (never dropped).

mutators.name: markNewRevision
mutators.semantics: Appends a new-revision marker without locking or rejecting concurrent writers; all revision events remain in history for merge-aware projection.

projections.name: getPlantDisplayName
projections.semantics: Returns the disclosed plant name as of asOf: a submitted custom name is used only when customNameEnabled is truthy and the name is nonempty; otherwise the generated name is used, combining season labels with '/' and crop labels with ', ', and preferring transplant location over seeding location.
projections.derived_from: invented: generated plant naming and ordered planting-location selection are computed inline by the planting workflow

projections.name: getRememberedSeasonDefaults
projections.semantics: Returns this actor's latest nonempty season selection from a created planting plan at or before asOf; a later plan with no seasons does not clear the prior default.
projections.derived_from: invented: future form defaults are conditional workflow state, not a named source accessor

projections.name: getHarvestLog
projections.semantics: Returns the disclosed harvest-log view at asOf, including status, isMovement:false, string-valued optional lotNumber, and quantityPayload exactly as recorded, including [null].

projections.name: getPlantLocation
projections.semantics: Returns the latest disclosed confirmed planting movement location at or before asOf; pending movements do not establish current location.
projections.derived_from: invented: location is a materialized interpretation of ordered seeding/transplanting events

projections.name: getHarvestTotals
projections.returns: Promise<{ yieldTotal: Quantity | null; logCount: number }>
projections.semantics: Folds disclosed harvest logs through the frozen status contract: yieldTotal and logCount require confirmed records, with the required pending-only-partner handling; movement records never contribute because isLog:false.
projections.derived_from: invented: yield and log counts are materialized folds over harvest events

projections.name: getBirthResolution
projections.returns: Promise<{ canonicalBirth: BirthLogHandle | undefined; demotedObservations: BirthLogHandle[] }>
projections.semantics: Returns the birth resolution at asOf: earliest-hlc-wins; later concurrent birth demoted to observation (never dropped).

projections.name: getRevisionState
projections.returns: Promise<{ currentRevision: RevisionHandle | undefined; revisionHistory: RevisionHandle[] } | undefined>
projections.semantics: Returns the disclosed merge-aware revision history and current projected revision marker at asOf; concurrent revision markers are retained rather than mutually excluded.

rationale: Mutators append domain events and return opaque handles; all handles use the fixed replica-scoped client id (prefix_replicaId~counter), collision-free by construction, no merge step needed. Planting is composite so asset creation and its movement taxonomy replay together: seeding/transplanting are distinct movement kinds with isLog:false, whereas harvest is a log with isMovement:false. The status-sensitive projections implement the frozen pending-status contract relevant here: location requires confirmed, while yieldTotal/logCount require confirmed with pending-only partners. Actor-bearing projections are disclosure-filtered materialized views: access is re-answered at the disclosure boundary rather than through an authoritative request-time write gate. Birth resolution uses the bound uniqueness rule verbatim, and revision history intentionally admits concurrent append-only histories.
